selfcheck.note: Theory: fit scale only on train.

exercises.code:
schema={'a':'num','b':'cat','c':'num'}
print(sorted(k for k,v in schema.items() if v=='num'))
print('n_num', sum(1 for v in schema.values() if v=='num'))
print('ok', True)

t='hola mundo pe'
print('note_len', len(t))
print('token_count', len(t.split()))
print('ok', True)

row={'a':1,'b':2}; cat={'a','b','c'}
print(all(k in cat for k in row))
print('extra', [k for k in row if k not in cat])
print('ok', True)

xs=[1.0,None,3.0]
vals=[x for x in xs if x is not None]
med=sorted(vals)[len(vals)//2]
print('miss_ind', [int(x is None) for x in xs])
print('filled', [med if x is None else x for x in xs])
print('med', med)

xs=[2.0,4.0]
mu, sd = 0.0, 2.0
print([(x-mu)/sd for x in xs])
print('mu', mu, 'sd', sd)
print('ok', True)

a,b='av-1','av-1'
print(int(a==b))
print('shared_address', a==b)
print('not_fraud_label', True)

adj={'E1':['E2','E3'],'E2':['E1']}
print(len(adj['E1']))
print('degree_E1', len(adj['E1']))
print('ok', True)

pl={('E1','E2'):1}
print(pl.get(('E1','E2'), 99))
print(pl.get(('E1','E9'), 99))
print('ok', True)

ev=[1,2,3,5]; t=5; W=3
n=sum(1 for x in ev if t-W <= x < t)
print(n)
print('window', W)
print('half_open', True)

from collections import Counter
rows=[('app',1),('app',2),('web',2)]
print(dict(Counter(c for c,_ in rows)))
print('n', len(rows))
print('ok', True)

ev=[(5,10),(4,1)]; t=5
kept=[a for ts,a in ev if ts < t]
print(sum(kept))
print('excluded_at_t', True)
print('ok', True)

from collections import Counter
xs=['a','b','a',None]
vals=[x for x in xs if x is not None]
moda=Counter(vals).most_common(1)[0][0]
out=[moda if x is None else x for x in xs]
print('moda', moda)
print('out', out)
print('ok', True)

xs=[None, 3]
step1=[0 if x is None else x for x in xs]
step2=[x*2 for x in step1]
print(step1)
print(step2)
print('ok', True)

fitted=False
if not fitted:
    print('error_not_fitted')
else:
    print('ok')
print('flag', fitted)
print('guard', True)

import json
st={'med': 10.0}
s=json.dumps(st); ld=json.loads(s)
print(ld['med'])
print('roundtrip', json.loads(json.dumps(st))==st)
print('persist', True)

v1={'app'}; v2={'app','web'}
bump = v1 != v2
print(bump)
print('v1', v1, 'v2', v2)
print('version_policy', 'bump_on_vocab_change')

med=10.0; batch=[None,12.0]
print([med if x is None else x for x in batch])
print('med', med)
print('serve', True)

rows=[{'ts':'2026-01-01'},{'ts':'2026-02-15'}]
tr=[r for r in rows if r['ts']<'2026-02-01']
print(tr)
print('n_train', len(tr))
print('time_split', True)

from collections import Counter
rows=['E1','E1','E2']
print(dict(Counter(rows)))
print('n', len(rows))
print('ok', True)

tr,te={'A','B'},{'C'}
print(len(tr & te))
print('overlap', tr & te)
print('ok', len(tr & te)==0)

names=['amt','label_y','reviewer_decision']
leaks=[n for n in names if 'label' in n or 'decision' in n]
print(leaks)
print('n', len(leaks))
print('fs_version', 'v3')

tr,se=0.0,0.8
alert = abs(se-tr) > 0.5
print(alert)
print('delta', abs(se-tr))
print('skew', True)

ver=3
print(f'fs-v{ver}')
print('format', 'fs-vN')
print('ok', True)
